---
name: Contributor task
about: Claim or propose a newcomer-friendly improvement
title: "[Task] "
labels: good first issue
assignees: ""
---

## Task summary

What small contribution do you want to work on?

## Scope

Keep it focused and explain which files or behavior will change.

## Validation

How should this be tested?

## Notes

Mention blockers, assumptions, or related issues.
